title: Better Optimization
body:
**This modpack is designed to improve game performance on the Fabric core. It includes the best optimization mods to reduce lag, boost FPS, and ensure a smooth gameplay experience.**

## Used mods:

- **Cloth Config API -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- **Dynamic FPS -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps/versions)
- **Entity Culling -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling/versions)
- **FPS Reducer -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer/versions)
- **Fabric API -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- **FerriteCore -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- **ImmediatelyFast -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast/versions)
- **Iris Shaders -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/iris/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris/versions)
- **Lithium -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- **Mod Menu -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- **ModernFix -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix/versions)
- **NoLoadingTerrain -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/noloadingterrain](https://modrinth.com/mod/noloadingterrain)
- **Sodium -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions) 
- **Sodium Extra -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra/versions)
- **Text Placeholder API -** [https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)


**See the image below for a comparison: before and after using the modpack.**
![Before/After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e5e950d1590f875fdc844a7ddb20e10b5d391a7.jpeg)
